cardPlayed.name: Defy
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Noxian Guillotine
cardPlayed.text:
[Action]_ (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)_
Choose a unit. Kill it the next time it takes damage this turn.
[Legion] — Kill it now instead. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.).

cardPlayed.name: Show of Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 1 for each of your [Mighty] units. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ :rb_might:.).

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text: ACTION (play on your turn or in showdowns.)  Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Acceptable Losses
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Each player kills one of their gear.

cardPlayed.name: Invert Timelines
cardPlayed.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

cardPlayed.name: Arise!
cardPlayed.text: Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token for each Equipment you control. Then ready two of them.

cardPlayed.name: Desert's Call
cardPlayed.text:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token.

cardPlayed.name: Sudden Storm
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden]** **(Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield. If it's attacking, deal 4 to it instead.

cardPlayed.name: Blast of Power
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Kill a unit at a battlefield.

cardPlayed.name: Singularity
cardPlayed.text: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Catalyst of Aeons
cardPlayed.text: Channel 2 runes exhausted. If you couldn't channel 2 runes this way, draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Reinforce
cardPlayed.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may play a unit from among them. Its Energy cost is reduced by :rb_energy_5:. Then recycle the remaining cards.

cardPlayed.name: The Harrowing
cardPlayed.text: Play a unit from your trash, ignoring its Energy cost. (You must still pay its Power cost.).

cardPlayed.name: Emperor's Divide
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move any number of friendly units at a battlefield to their base.

cardPlayed.name: Wind Wall
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell.

cardPlayed.name: Party Favors
cardPlayed.text: Each other player chooses Cards or Runes. For each player that chooses Cards, you and that player each draw 1. For each player that chooses Runes, you and that player each channel 1 rune exhausted.
